sourceTitle: Research Ethics Guidelines for the Use of Generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The use of generative AI may be permitted or restricted depending on the course. Students are expected to consult the syllabus and course policies to determine whether its use is allowed.
evidenceLocator: Guidelines for Students on the Use of Generative AI, item 1
